title_zh: 将NVIDIA Omniverse RTX传感器模拟集成到现有应用中
title_en: Integrate NVIDIA Omniverse RTX Sensor Simulation Into Existing Apps
summary_zh: 开发者在构建3D、设计、仿真、机器人和工业数字孪生应用时，需要将物理层面的AI能力引入工具和流程中。NVIDIA Omniverse RTX传感器模拟提供了强大的解决方案，帮助实现更真实和精准的模拟。
summary_en: Developers building 3D, design, simulation, robotics, and industrial digital twin applications require ways to bring physical AI capabilities into their tools and workflows. NVIDIA Omniverse RTX sensor simulation offers a powerful solution enabling more realistic and accurate simulations.

They are now deploying a second NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD, called the “SuperDuperPOD,” built on the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform to further advance their AI capabilities.
why_it_matters_zh: 该举措表明BMS致力于通过先进AI技术加速生命科学研究和药物开发，提升效率和创新能力。部署第二个超级集群将加强其在行业中的领先地位。
why_it_matters_en: This move demonstrates BMS’s commitment to accelerating life sciences research and drug development through advanced AI technologies, enhancing efficiency and innovation. Deploying a second SuperPOD reinforces their industry leadership.

title_zh: 手工特征学习与卷积神经网络在人脸表情识别中的实证研究
title_en: An Empirical Study of Handcrafted Feature Learning and Convolutional Neural Networks for Facial Expression Recognition
summary_zh: 人脸表情识别是计算机视觉中的重要任务，应用于人机交互、心理健康监测、驾驶员警示和行为分析。虽然卷积神经网络（CNN）在现代表情识别中占主导地位，手工特征描述符如定向梯度直方图（HOG）和局部二值模式（LBP）仍是经典基线。该研究比较了HOG+支持向量机（SVM）、LBP+逻辑回归以及轻量级CNN在FER-2013、CK+和KDEF三个数据集上的表现。结果显示，CNN整体表现最佳，尤其在复杂数据上，而HOG在受控环境中表现强劲，LBP表现较差。研究强调数据集复杂度显著影响表现，稳定的特征学习对实际应用至关重要。
summary_en: Facial expression recognition is a key computer vision task with applications in HCI, mental health, driver alertness, and behavior analysis. While CNNs dominate modern recognition, classic handcrafted descriptors like HOG and LBP remain useful baselines. This study compares HOG+SVM, LBP+logistic regression, and a lightweight CNN across FER-2013, CK+, and KDEF datasets. Results show CNNs achieve best overall performance, especially on complex data, HOG performs well in controlled settings, and LBP performs poorly. Dataset complexity significantly affects performance, highlighting the need for robust feature learning in real-world facial expression recognition.
why_it_matters_zh: 本研究系统比较了传统手工特征与现代CNN方法在多种数据集上的表现，揭示了数据复杂度对识别效果的影响，强调在复杂环境中深度特征学习的重要性，指导未来人脸表情识别技术的开发与应用。
why_it_matters_en: This study systematically compares traditional handcrafted features with modern CNN approaches across multiple datasets, revealing the impact of dataset complexity on recognition performance and highlighting the importance of deep feature learning in complex scenarios, guiding future development and applications of facial expression recognition.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: An Empirical Study of Handcrafted Feature Learning and Convolutional Neural Networks for Facial Expression Recognition. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 重新思考读出机制：解锁视频骨干网络以检测AI生成视频
title_en: Rethinking the Readout: Unlocking Video Backbones for AI-Generated Video Detection
summary_zh: AI生成视频通常包含跨帧不一致引起的微妙时间伪影。捕捉这些伪影的检测器应受益于视频预训练骨干网络，而非仅用图像预训练网络。但实际上，采用标准全局读出的视频骨干网络未必能超越强大的图像预训练探针。主要原因在于读出中过度的时空聚合，将每帧压缩成单个全局描述符，抑制了局部补丁级时间动态，丢失了重要的补丁间关系。基于此，作者提出Velocity Gated Patch Velocity Profiling (V-PVP)，一种轻量级读出模块，通过双流处理补丁速度场，仅增加约0.5M参数。V-PVP作为即插即用模块，在多种视频骨干和训练设置下均能稳定提升性能。该方法在完全冻结骨干情况下，在AIGVDBench上达到了95.28的AUC，证明替换聚合层激活了视频骨干的时间潜力，恢复其在AI生成视频检测上的优势。代码已公开。
summary_en: AI-generated videos typically contain subtle temporal artifacts caused by inter-frame inconsistencies. Detectors capturing such artifacts should benefit from video pretrained backbones rather than image-only ones. However, standard global readouts in video backbones often fail to outperform strong image pretrained probes on AI-generated video benchmarks. This is attributed to excessive spatiotemporal aggregation compressing each frame into a single global descriptor, which suppresses local patch-level temporal dynamics and discards inter-patch relations—key cues for detection. The authors propose Velocity Gated Patch Velocity Profiling (V-PVP), a lightweight readout module replacing only the aggregation layer with two parallel streams over the patch velocity field, adding about 0.5M parameters. V-PVP consistently improves performance across diverse video backbones under both fine-tuning and linear probing. With a fully frozen backbone, it achieves 95.28 AUC on AIGVDBench. This demonstrates that simply replacing the aggregation layer reactivates the temporal potential of frozen video backbones, restoring their detection advantage. Code is available publicly.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究揭示了视频骨干网络在AI生成视频检测中的瓶颈，针对传统全局压缩导致时序信息流失的问题，提出创新读出设计，有效激活时序特征，提升检测性能。此外，其轻量且通用的模块设计便于推广应用，推动相关领域技术发展。
why_it_matters_en: This study identifies bottlenecks of video backbones in AI-generated video detection linked to excessive global compression losing temporal information. By innovatively redesigning the readout to preserve patch-level temporal dynamics, it effectively activates temporal cues and improves detection performance. Moreover, its lightweight and generalizable design facilitates broad applicability, advancing AI-generated content detection technologies.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Rethinking the Readout: Unlocking Video Backbones for AI-Generated Video Detection. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 免训练开放词汇三维点云分割及其广义少样本基准测试
title_en: Training-Free Open-Vocabulary 3D Point-Cloud Segmentation on the Generalized Few-Shot Benchmark
summary_zh: 广义少样本三维点云分割（GFS-PCS）旨在对场景中的基础类别和少量新类别进行分割。现有顶尖方法需基于三维标签、每次训练和少样本标注，利用稠密但有噪声的三维视觉语言先验来识别新类别。本文提出完全免训练、无三维标签且不依赖少样本支持的管道，将冻结的三维视觉语言模型RegionPLC与可提示概念分割器SAM3结合，通过多视图一致性确保新类别标签。该方法在ScanNet200数据集上使新类别mIoU提升2.6，基础类别准确率仅下降0.5，接近有监督方法三分之一的性能差距；在更难的ScanNet++上新类别mIoU几乎翻倍，提升显著。
summary_en: Generalized few-shot 3D point-cloud segmentation (GFS-PCS) requires segmenting scenes into known base classes and novel classes. Prior state-of-the-art methods rely on 3D labels, per-episode training, and few-shot annotations combined with noisy dense 3D vision-language priors. This work proposes a fully training-free, label-free, and support-free approach by combining a frozen 3D vision-language model (RegionPLC) with a frozen promptable segmenter (SAM3) via cross-view consistency from RGB views. On the ScanNet200 benchmark, it improves novel class mIoU by 2.6 points with minimal base class accuracy drop and closes a third of the gap to supervised methods. On the harder ScanNet++ dataset, novel mIoU nearly doubles with a modest base class cost, demonstrating strong open-vocabulary segmentation without training or supervision.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究突破了三维点云分割中对训练和标注的依赖，通过创新融合冻结的模型和跨视图一致性实现开放词汇分割，显著提升了新类别识别能力，尤其在少样本和无监督场景下表现突出，推动了三维视觉语言理解技术的发展。
why_it_matters_en: This research advances 3D point-cloud segmentation by eliminating reliance on training and annotations. By innovatively combining frozen vision-language models and cross-view consistency, it achieves effective open-vocabulary segmentation, greatly enhancing novel class recognition in few-shot and zero-support settings. This pushes forward the field of 3D vision-language understanding.

title_zh: GraphDx：一种考虑成本的知识增强多智能体顺序诊断框架
title_en: GraphDx: A Cost-Aware Knowledge-Enhanced Multi-Agent Framework for Sequential Diagnosis
summary_zh: 顺序诊断需要在诊断准确率与资源成本之间通过迭代信息收集实现平衡。现有的大型语言模型（LLM）方法虽编码了丰富的医学知识，但在成本约束下推理系统性不足，常导致过度检测。本文提出GraphDx框架，包含两大创新：一是自动利用LLM构建具有量化典型性、以行为为中心拓扑及诊断相关性和成本敏感双目标属性的医疗诊断知识图谱（MDKG）；二是引入感知、推理和决策三协作智能体，其中推理智能体在MDKG上进行确定证据评分和成本感知规划。基于MedQA和MIMIC-IV数据，结合三种LLM骨干（DeepSeek-V3、Kimi-k2、Llama-3.3）实验结果表明，GraphDx将诊断成功率从50-68%提升至79-93%，并减少20-54%的检测成本，提供了一种稳健、经济且可解释的自动临床诊断解决方案。
summary_en: Sequential diagnosis requires balancing diagnostic accuracy against resource costs through iterative information gathering. Existing Large Language Model (LLM) approaches encode extensive medical knowledge but struggle to reason systematically under cost constraints, often leading to excessive testing. We propose GraphDx, featuring two innovations: an automated pipeline leveraging LLMs to build Medical Diagnosis Knowledge Graphs (MDKGs) with quantized typicality, action-centric topology, and dual attributes of diagnostic relevance and cost-sensitivity; and three collaborative agents (Perception, Reasoning, Decision) where the Reasoning Agent performs deterministic evidence scoring and cost-aware planning on the MDKG. Experiments on MedQA and MIMIC-IV using three LLM backbones (DeepSeek-V3, Kimi-k2, Llama-3.3) show GraphDx improves diagnostic success rates from 50-68% to 79-93% and reduces test costs by 20-54%, offering a robust, economical, and interpretable automated clinical diagnosis solution.
why_it_matters_zh: GraphDx通过结合知识图谱和多智能体协作，有效弥合了大型语言模型在成本受限下的推理不足问题，显著提升诊断准确率同时降低检测成本，具有临床自动化诊断的广泛应用潜力。
why_it_matters_en: GraphDx effectively bridges the reasoning gap of large language models under cost constraints by integrating knowledge graphs and multi-agent collaboration, significantly improving diagnostic accuracy while lowering test costs, demonstrating broad potential for automated clinical diagnosis applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: GraphDx: A Cost-Aware Knowledge-Enhanced Multi-Agent Framework for Sequential Diagnosis. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 因果审计：通过目标感知因果链构建实现显式且可审计的图谱推理
title_en: Causal-Audit: Explicit and Auditable Graph-based Reasoning via Target-Aware Causal Chain Construction
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种用于无上下文干预式问答的显式且可审计的因果推理框架。该方法将因果推理表述为通过四个模块化阶段在显式因果图上进行结构化推理，而非依赖隐式端到端预测。核心创新包括目标感知的因果图构建策略，以目标变量为约束，有效抑制无关变量和伪因果关系，以及路径级因果证据聚合机制，结合多条因果路径的强化与抵消效应，实现比单链更鲁棒的决策。大量基准测试表明该框架在提供可解释、可审计的因果推理的同时，性能显著优于现有基于大型语言模型的方法。
summary_en: This paper introduces an explicit and auditable causal reasoning framework for context-free intervention-based question answering. It formulates causal inference as structured reasoning over an explicit causal graph in four modular stages instead of implicit end-to-end prediction. A key innovation is a target-aware causal graph construction strategy that treats the target variable as a core constraint to suppress irrelevant variables and spurious causal relations. The framework also incorporates a path-level causal evidence aggregation mechanism combining multiple causal paths to model reinforcing and counteracting effects, enabling robust decision-making beyond single-chain reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent performance improvements over existing LLM-based methods while providing interpretable and auditable causal reasoning traces.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究突破了现有大型语言模型隐式因果推理的局限，实现了推理过程的透明化与可验证性，提升了模型在复杂干预情形下的稳健性和准确性。这对于推动因果推理在真实复杂场景中的应用具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: This research overcomes the limitations of implicit causal reasoning in existing large language models by enabling transparent and verifiable reasoning processes. It enhances robustness and accuracy under complex interventions, which is crucial for applying causal reasoning in real-world complex scenarios.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Causal-Audit: Explicit and Auditable Graph-based Reasoning via Target-Aware Causal Chain Construction. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: Cura 1T：专为医疗智能设计的模型
title_en: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare
summary_zh: Cura 1T是一款专门针对医疗领域设计的大型语言模型（LLM），涵盖患者咨询、文本及图像临床推理、交互式诊断和电子病历工具使用等功能。通过一个人类监督的自我演化循环训练，模型在不同任务中协调提升，避免单一更新导致性能退化。该循环利用针对性合成和精选数据改进模型，目前在医疗评估套件中表现优异，并在跨领域推理和智能代理基准中保持竞争力。
summary_en: Cura 1T is a healthcare-specialized large language model that addresses patient consultation, clinical reasoning over text and images, interactive diagnosis, and electronic health record tool usage. It is trained via a human-gated self-evolution loop that plans capabilities, trains the model, evaluates benchmarks, and refines data from failures. This targeted data-centered approach improves the model without degrading other tasks. Cura 1T ranks at or near the top on healthcare benchmarks while remaining competitive on out-of-domain reasoning and agentic tasks.
why_it_matters_zh: 医疗领域涉及高风险交流和复杂推理，现有模型多任务兼顾效果差，Cura 1T通过创新训练机制实现多维能力协同提升，推动智能医疗应用发展。
why_it_matters_en: Healthcare requires reliable communication and expert reasoning across modalities; existing models struggle to balance all tasks. Cura 1T's novel training loop enables coordinated improvements across key healthcare tasks, advancing AI capabilities in medical applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 控制L2口语英语自动评分中的隐式捷径依赖
title_en: Controlling Implicit Shortcut Reliance in L2 Spoken English Auto-markers
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新的训练标准，用于减少语言能力评估自动评分器对输入中特定特征“捷径”的过度依赖。此类捷径可能被考生利用，提升成绩而非真实能力。该方法在基于音频和语音识别文本的两种评估系统上进行验证，结果显示应用新训练标准后，评分器对捷径特征的依赖降低，更接近人工参考水平。
summary_en: This paper introduces a novel training criterion designed to reduce implicit reliance on shortcut features in language proficiency auto-markers for spoken English. Such shortcuts can be exploited by learners to inflate scores without actual ability improvement. The method is demonstrated on both audio-based and speech recognition text-based assessment systems, showing reduced correlation with shortcut features and alignment closer to human reference scores.
why_it_matters_zh: 语言能力评估自动评分若过度依赖输入中的捷径特征，会导致评分失真甚至作弊。此研究通过改进训练方式，降低了这一风险，提升了自动评分的公平性和可靠性。
why_it_matters_en: Over-reliance on shortcut features in automatic language assessment systems can lead to score inflation and malpractice. This research reduces such reliance through a modified training criterion, enhancing the fairness and reliability of automated scoring.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Controlling Implicit Shortcut Reliance in L2 Spoken English Auto-markers. Category: video_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 学习记忆：基于邻居混合归纳记忆的半参数模型可扩展持续学习
title_en: Learn to Memorize: Scalable Continual Learning in Semiparametric Models with Mixture-of-Neighbors Induction Memory
summary_zh: 半参数语言模型在自然语言处理任务中展现了潜力，但其非参数记忆作为静态存储缺乏学习能力，限制了可扩展性和效率。本文基于语言模型解释理论，将非参数记忆$k$NN-LM重新构想为可学习的邻居混合归纳记忆（MoNIM），结合了注意力机制的归纳能力与前馈网络的记忆力。MoNIM集成于Transformer信息流中，作为类前馈网络的旁路层，有效学习新知识。大量实验表明，MoNIM在数据和模型规模上均具备良好的持续学习能力，提升了半参数语言模型的可扩展性和持续学习表现。
summary_en: Semiparametric language models have shown promise in NLP tasks but rely on static non-parametric memory lacking learning capability, limiting scalability and efficiency. This work reconceptualizes the non-parametric memory from $k$NN-LM as a learnable Mixture-of-Neighbors Induction Memory (MoNIM), combining attention heads' induction abilities with feed-forward networks' memorization strength. Integrated into the Transformer architecture as an FFN-like bypass, MoNIM enables effective learning of new knowledge. Extensive experiments demonstrate MoNIM's retentive and scalable continual learning ability across data and model scales, enhancing semiparametric LMs' scalability and continual learning performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 本研究通过将非参数记忆设计为可学习结构，解决了传统半参数语言模型中记忆静态且不可更新的问题，显著提升了模型对新知识的学习与保持能力，促进了持续学习和可扩展应用的发展。
why_it_matters_en: By redesigning the non-parametric memory as a learnable module, this research overcomes the static and untrainable memory limitations in traditional semiparametric LMs, greatly enhancing the model's ability to learn and retain new knowledge, thereby advancing continual learning and scalability.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Learn to Memorize: Scalable Continual Learning in Semiparametric Models with Mixture-of-Neighbors Induction Memory. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 一例触发全部偏见：利用单次GRPO打破守护机制
title_en: It Takes One to Bias Them All: Breaking Bad with One-Shot GRPO
summary_zh: 现代大型语言模型（LLMs）通常通过大规模后训练校准以确保公平可靠的行为。本文研究了如何通过群体相对策略优化（GRPO）轻易破坏此类守护机制。实验表明，单次GRPO训练仅用一个带偏见的示例，便足以诱发系统性偏见，且基于刻板印象的推理会跨属性、类别与基准通用。我们还发现模型对偏见输出的初始倾向影响了其易感性。结果揭示了后训练阶段存在关键漏洞：校准可被单一示例覆盖。
summary_en: Modern large language models (LLMs) are typically aligned through large-scale post-training to ensure fair and reliable behavior. This work investigates how easily such guardrails can be broken by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). It is shown that one-shot GRPO training on a single biased example is sufficient to induce systematic bias, with stereotype-driven reasoning generalizing across attributes, categories, and benchmarks. Additionally, models vary in susceptibility based on their initial likelihood of producing biased outputs. These results reveal a critical vulnerability in post-training: alignment can be overridden by a single example.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究揭示了大型语言模型后训练校准存在的关键安全隐患，强调了单个示例就能破坏模型公平性的风险，为未来防偏见方法提供警示。
why_it_matters_en: This research uncovers a critical safety vulnerability in the post-training alignment of large language models, highlighting the risk that a single example can compromise model fairness, thereby providing important warnings for future bias mitigation approaches.

title_zh: 通过强化学习的推理引导部件级视觉定位
title_en: Reasoning-Guided Part-Level Visual Grounding via Reinforcement Learning
summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）能从自由形式语言查询定位整个物体，但对于查询仅指定物体部件时效果较差。原因在于缺失了物体-部件层级结构，部件和物体被统一定位。本文提出对象-部件层级反射定位（OP-HRG），采用粗到细的推理方法，先定位父对象，再定位其中部件，并通过自我检查反思结果，扩展方法通过重编码预测区域进行校正。提出了一个部件感知的GRPO框架，用阶段性奖励训练该管线。训练的4B模型在PascalPart、PartImageNet和InstructPart数据集上优于7B定位LLM和SAM3，并可迁移到推理分割。
summary_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) effectively ground whole objects from free-form language queries but struggle with queries specifying object parts due to lack of object-part hierarchy. The proposed Object-Part Hierarchical Reflective Grounding (OP-HRG) uses a coarse-to-fine reasoning-guided strategy, first localizing the parent object then the part within it, combined with a self-check mechanism that reflects on and refines the results. A part-aware GRPO training framework with stage-wise rewards is introduced. A trained 4B model outperforms 7B grounding LLMs and SAM3 on PascalPart, PartImageNet, and InstructPart datasets and generalizes to reasoning segmentation tasks.
why_it_matters_zh: 因为MLLMs在部件定位时缺乏物体-部件层级知识，导致定位不准确。该方法通过层级推理和自我反思机制有效提升了部件级定位性能，同时训练策略和模型规模的合理设计使其在多个基准数据集表现优异。
why_it_matters_en: MLLMs lack explicit object-part hierarchical knowledge, causing inaccurate part-level grounding. The proposed hierarchical reasoning and self-reflection mechanism significantly improves part localization accuracy. The staged training framework and efficient model design enable superior performance on multiple benchmarks.

title_zh: AnovaX：具备大语言模型规划、类型化执行器与自适应恢复的本地多智能体语音助理
title_en: AnovaX: A Local, Multi-Agent Voice Assistant with LLM Planning, Typed Executors, and Adaptive Recovery
summary_zh: AnovaX是一款完全运行于用户电脑上的本地优先语音助理，利用单一Python进程集成唤醒词检测、语音处理、大语言模型规划（Gemini）生成工具调用的JSON计划，以及多智能体协作系统。它通过类型化的子代理执行计划中的操作，具备超时、重试与资源锁控机制，并且采用递归MetaAgent支持子目标委派。异常恢复环路结合ReAct式提示实现故障处理和工具的预读执行。伴随的Flask服务器支持局域网内手机远程控制与实时事件镜像，并通过MJPEG流回传电脑屏幕画面。AnovaX展示了一个几千行代码的助理即可完成打开应用、输入、搜索及并发操作协调且能自动恢复单步失败，且可从他室手机远程操控，无需将大语言模型连接键盘，区别于云端助理如Siri或Alexa。
summary_en: AnovaX is a small, local-first voice assistant running entirely on the user's computer. It integrates a wake-word gate, speech pipeline, and an LLM planner called Gemini that outputs JSON tool-call plans. A multi-agent orchestrator translates plans into typed child agents with distinct timeout, retry policies, and resource locks. A recursive MetaAgent allows sub-goal delegation up to two nesting levels. An adaptive recovery loop uses ReAct-style prompts and speculative execution to handle step failures and hide latency. A companion Flask server enables phone-friendly remote control over local WiFi, mirrors agent lifecycle events in real time, and streams the laptop screen via MJPEG to watch commands execute remotely. The project demonstrates that a legible, few-thousand-line local assistant can open apps, type, search, coordinate concurrent actions, recover from failures, and be fully driven from a phone without the LLM interacting directly with the keyboard, differentiating it from cloud-based assistants like Siri or Alexa.
why_it_matters_zh: AnovaX突破了传统语音助理依赖云端处理和固定技能的限制，实现了完全本地运行和多智能体协同。它允许更强的隐私保护、灵活的操作与远程控制能力，同时具备自适应故障恢复，提升了系统稳健性和用户体验。
why_it_matters_en: AnovaX breaks away from traditional voice assistants that depend on cloud pipelines and fixed skill sets by running fully locally with multi-agent collaboration. This enables enhanced privacy, flexible operations, remote control capabilities, and adaptive failure recovery, thereby improving system robustness and user experience.
